SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":87,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c1].[CartID], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[SessionId], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UserId], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId]
    FROM [Carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] = @userId AND [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedById], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[ModifiedById], [c0].[ProductId], [c0].[Quantity], [c0].[UnitPrice], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c0].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c1].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[CartID], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","ActionId":"9d023214-dabf-4c4c-bfa1-e09edb676820","ActionName":"AudioStore.Api.Controllers.CartController.GetCart (AudioStore.Api)","RequestId":"0HNKEKANB9E8Q:0000001D","RequestPath":"/api/v1.0/cart","ConnectionId":"0HNKEKANB9E8Q","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":69,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":61,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":46,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":61,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":94,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":62,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":78,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":22,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[CurrentUsages], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[ExpiresAt], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[MaxUsages], [p].[MinOrderAmount], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UserId], [s].[PromoCodeId], [s].[AssignedAt], [s].[IsUsed], [s].[UsedAt], [s].[Id], [s].[AccessFailedCount], [s].[ConcurrencyStamp], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[Email], [s].[EmailConfirmed], [s].[FirstName], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[LastName], [s].[LockoutEnabled], [s].[LockoutEnd], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[NormalizedEmail], [s].[NormalizedUserName], [s].[PasswordHash], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [s].[RegistrationDate], [s].[SecurityStamp], [s].[TwoFactorEnabled], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UserName]
FROM [PromoCodes] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[UserId], [u1].[PromoCodeId], [u1].[AssignedAt], [u1].[IsUsed], [u1].[UsedAt], [u2].[Id], [u2].[AccessFailedCount], [u2].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[CreatedById], [u2].[Email], [u2].[EmailConfirmed], [u2].[FirstName], [u2].[IsActive], [u2].[IsDeleted], [u2].[LastName], [u2].[LockoutEnabled], [u2].[LockoutEnd], [u2].[ModifiedById], [u2].[NormalizedEmail], [u2].[NormalizedUserName], [u2].[PasswordHash], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u2].[RegistrationDate], [u2].[SecurityStamp], [u2].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u2].[UpdatedAt], [u2].[UserName]
    FROM [UserPromoCodes] AS [u1]

    SELECT [u].[UserId], [u].[PromoCodeId], [u].[AssignedAt], [u].[IsUsed], [u].[UsedAt], [u0].[Id], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[CreatedById], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[IsDeleted], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[ModifiedById], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[RegistrationDate], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [u0].[UserName]
    FROM [UserPromoCodes] AS [u]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [u].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[PromoCodeId]
WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

SELECT [c1].[CartID], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[SessionId], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UserId], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId]
    FROM [Carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] = @userId AND [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedById], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[ModifiedById], [c0].[ProductId], [c0].[Quantity], [c0].[UnitPrice], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c0].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c1].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]

2026-03-31 16:10:43.088 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (52ms) [Parameters=[@updatedBefore='2026-03-31T13:40:43.0331695Z', @emailCooldownBefore='2026-03-30T14:10:43.0331686Z' (Nullable = true)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

FROM [Users] AS [u]
INNER JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u0] ON [u].[Id] = [u0].[UserId]
INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CreatedById], [o].[CustomerEmail], [o].[CustomerFirstName], [o].[CustomerLastName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[IsDeleted], [o].[ModifiedById], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PromoCodeId], [o].[ShippingCity], [o].[ShippingCost], [o].[ShippingCountry], [o].[ShippingPostalCode], [o].[ShippingStreet], [o].[Status], [o].[Subtotal], [o].[Tax], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[UserId]

    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":33,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":72,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}
